item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena di Indonesia justru kita sering melihat alasan “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa.

notes: Agent A begins by saying SAYA SETUJU but immediately limits that support; by turn 3 and final turn A explicitly rejects the general priority of society over individual rights and adopts a rights-as-boundary frame close to Agent B. Agent B rejects the statement throughout, while allowing narrow emergency exceptions.
